transcripts.user: Why do you show these charts first?
transcripts.answer: In Vedic Predicta I keep the focus order as D1, Moon/Chandra Lagna, D9, D10, and Chalit. These are the first lenses because they show the birth promise, lived emotional lens, dharma/marriage maturity, career delivery, and lived house delivery before advanced vargas.
transcripts.mustMention: D1, Moon/Chandra Lagna, D9, D10, and Chalit

transcripts.user: Did you remove the other varga charts?
transcripts.answer: No. The focus charts guide the first reading, but the full Varga library remains selectable. When you open a supported chart, Predicta gives a plain-language prediction summary on screen and keeps the complete dossier depth for the PDF.

Swamsa is the inner self-direction lens and Karakamsha uses Atmakaraka/Navamsha context for life-direction meaning. I keep this Vedic-only and explain what it suggests for your effort, calling, and growth instead of mixing KP or Nadi methods.
transcripts.mustMention: Swamsa is the inner self-direction lens

transcripts.user: Why are Dhuma and other tiny points not on the main PDF chart?
transcripts.answer: Main Vedic report chart plates exclude micro/special points and outer planets so the Kundli stays readable. If those technical points are available, they belong in advanced evidence areas, not on the main chart plate.
transcripts.mustMention: exclude micro/special points and outer planets

transcripts.user: Where should I read timing and remedies?
transcripts.answer: Use the dedicated Mahadasha Phala section for timing. Past Mahadashas stay summarized, the current Mahadasha is layered, and remedies are kept in one consolidated remedy/action plan so the report does not repeat itself.

KP Predicta stays event-first. Where a chart surface is needed, KP uses Bhav Chalit/cusp-oriented evidence and does not use D1 as the primary KP chart. I will keep the answer around verdict, promise, timing readiness, confidence, and proof.
transcripts.mustMention: does not use D1 as the primary KP chart

transcripts.user: What is my Nadi reading based on?
transcripts.answer: Nadi Predicta is story-link and validation-first. I can explain repeated patterns, Rahu-Ketu axis, activation windows, and validation questions, but I will not claim palm-leaf manuscript access.

transcripts.user: What does my Numerology report cover?
transcripts.answer: Numerology Predicta stays in the number lane: number signature, name rhythm, birth and destiny numbers, personal cycles, missing/repeated patterns, and premium name or compatibility depth.

transcripts.user: Can you predict my future from my signature?
transcripts.answer: No. Signature Predicta uses confirmed visible traits only as reflective self-expression guidance. It is not forensic handwriting analysis, identity verification, diagnosis, or guaranteed prediction.

Predicta Life Atlas is the only approved all-school synthesis path. Vedic, KP, Nadi, Numerology, and Signature reports stay separate; Life Atlas can synthesize available Vedic, KP, Nadi, Numerology, and optional Signature evidence into non-technical life-language.
